title: OIIA Cats (QUARTER SPEED)
description: Cats go spinny and say "OO EE EE AA EE"
body:
# **REQUIRES {EMF} OR {OPTIFINE}**


### FEATURES
- Cats go spinny like the OIIA cat
- Cat sounds are replaced with "OIIA OIIA"
- Pigscene painting replaced with commissioned\
artwork by _[idrawcutethings](https://www.instagram.com/idrawcutethings)_ (also used for the icon!)

![Depiction of the commissioned artwork in-game (as a painting) on an oak plank wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c37eb938f775bdc67e4d68868293e70732efe5.png)

↓ **Different speeds are avaliable!** ↓

| [![25% Cat Rotation Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b3b6c474eb2e77c7d8f1a0ed449cdc765867f2.gif)](https://modrinth.com/project/bdOR7MIJ)             | [![50% Cat Rotation Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/783101e6cdf269358c364254c02cb8d9bb820f8d.gif)](https://modrinth.com/project/kjLfMrsR)               | [![100% Cat Rotation Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6388ff1e59618b5600c8f8dc7726281eb29d9902.gif)](https://modrinth.com/project/auiqZbSL)              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
|  YOU ARE HERE       |                       |                      |

<details>
<summary>Note</summary>
These gifs are 30 fps (and kinda laggy), the difference may be more visible in-game at higher frame rates.
</details>

This Resource Pack is dedicated to _[Ethel The OIIA Cat](https://www.youtube.com/@oiiacat_ethel)_
